title: 22mm x 1" Male Compression Parallel Elbow - Pack of 2
features: IMPORTANT SIZING NOTE - Most plumbing products are measured using BSP thread dimensions which measure 1/4 inch larger than that stated, therefore this 1 Inch BSP thread actually measures 1 1/4 Inch in diameter. If your thread measures 1 Inch in diameter then you require the 3/4 Inch version of this product
This listing is for a Pack of 2

Using a 1 inch BSP (please see sizing note) male thread this will join a 22mm copper or plastic plumbing pipes in a 90 degree elbow arrangement (pipe inserts are required when using to connect plastic pipe)
Seal is formed with the olive and not the thread so PTFE is not recommended as it can reduce the compression capabilities of the thread.
description: Brass Compression Parallel Male Elbow - 22mm x 1"The Brass Male Elbow - 22mm x 1" is your top choice for a 90-degree elbow in plumbing. Crafted as the exclusive compression fittings range in the UK, it offers quality assurance. With a heat-free mechanical connection, WRAS Approval, and suitability for both gas and water, it's perfect for domestic and commercial heating. Plus, its easy installation requires minimal tools, making your upgrade hassle-free.Other sizes Available: Parallel Male Elbow - 8mm, 10mm, 15mm, 22mm, 28mm, 35mm, 42mm and 54mm. Technical Specifications: Parallel Male Elbow Manufactured From Brass High-Grade Product Material: Brass Quality and Reliable Easy to Use Other Sizes Available Easy to install Size: 22mm x 1" ;Please Note: BSP threads are 1/4 inch larger than that stated in BSP terms.
